title: Automation to Set Item Name to Something
excerpt:

posts.author: DarrenFinnigan (Darren Finnigan)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very nice if we could set the name of an item based on an automation trigger.
The use case I am thinking of right now is a form that we are using to register franchise owners for a training. I have a status column that lists the franchise location so that the owner can select their own location while filling in the form. The status column will trigger other automations, but I want the Item name to reflect the location name they selected.
I have also wanted this feature for other use cases, mostly where forms are involved.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DarrenFinnigan!

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

It’s possible with our Column to Column app. You can use standard, mirror or formula column to change the item name!

image1347×708 88.3 KB

For copying standard column to name, app also introduces a custom automation block:

image787×466 72.7 KB

I hope you find them useful. If you have any questions or run into issues, let us know!
